tools.name: deploy_anomaly_detection
tools.description: Deploy Anomaly Detection — configure time-series detection pipeline, Azure Monitor Anomaly Detector, alerting rules, LLM root cause analysis, dashboards. Use when: deploy, provision, configure detection.

tools.name: evaluate_anomaly_detection
tools.description: Evaluate Anomaly Detection — measure precision, recall, F1 on labeled anomalies, false positive rate, detection latency, root cause accuracy. Use when: evaluate, benchmark detection.

tools.name: tune_anomaly_detection
tools.description: Tune Anomaly Detection — optimize detection thresholds (σ levels), time windows, suppression rules, seasonal baselines, alert routing, false positive reduction. Use when: tune, optimize detection.
